# Word Filter Configuration
# Automatically generated once the server starts.
# Only reloads and cached on server startup

# Accepts Single words or Multi-word phrases (one word per line) & (will match exact phrase):
badword (word)
bad phrase here (phrase)

# The filter automatically:
# - Converts to lowercase
# - Strips punctuation 
# - Normalizes Unicode 
# - Handles accented characters
